user-prompt-submit-hook.instructions:
CRITICAL DEPLOYMENT WORKFLOW CHECKLIST:
After completing ANY task (bug fix, feature, refactor), you MUST:

1. Bump version in src/version.ts (semantic versioning)
2. Sync version in package.json
3. Update HISTORY.md with changelog entry (append, newest first)
4. Update CLAUDE.md if architecture/dependencies changed
5. Commit: git add changed files + git commit
6. Push: git push origin main

NEVER complete a task without doing ALL 6 steps. The user will be deployed automatically via GitHub Actions.
